caption: Table 156. Document revision history
rows: Corrected maximum CPU frequency in Table 3: STM32H7Rxx8 features and peripheral counts. Added: – Section 3.3.2: Secure access mode – Section 6: Electrical characteristics.

Updated: – Cover page features – Figure 1: STM32H7Rxx8 block diagram – Table 2: Security and graphics IP availability per product line (replaced TIL by HDP) – Table 3: STM32H7Rxx8 features and peripheral counts: junction maximum temperature, display interface (bits), and SMPS step-down converter – Section 3.5.1: Power supply scheme – Table 19: STM32H7Rxx8 pin and ball descriptions (indicated pins with fm+ capable I/O structure 'FT_fh') – Figure 12: UFBGA176 SMPS GFx pinout – Table 20: STM32H7Rxx8 pin alternate functions (added PG12 to PG15) – Table 24: General operating conditions – Junction maximum temperature in Section 6: Electrical characteristics – Table 41: Typical and maximum current consumption in System Stop mode through Table 49: Typical and maximum current consumption: data write 6.25% toggle on 16-bit memory – Table 62: PLL1/2/3 characteristics (wide VCO frequency range) (title) – Table 63: PLL1/2/3 characteristics (low VCO frequency range) (title and content). – Removed previous document revision Table 66 and Table 67. – Table 99: XSPI characteristics in DTR mode (with DQS)/Hyperbus – Section 7.7: UFBGA169 package information (A0YV) – Section 7.11: TFBGA225 package information (B04V) – Table 155: Package thermal characteristics (typo corrected)

Updates: – Core description on cover page. – Table 19: STM32H7Rxx8 pin and ball descriptions. – Introduction text removed in Output buffer timing characteristics (HSLV option disabled). – Table 24: General operating conditions – Table 115: PSSI transmit characteristics. – Table 58: PSSI transmit timing diagram – Table 132: OTG_HS current consumption characteristics – Table 133: UCPD electrical characteristics
Updated: – Table 2: Security and graphics IP availability per product line – Table 3: STM32H7Rxx8 features and peripheral counts

Updated: – V parameter in Table 21: Voltage characteristics and Table 24: General IN operating conditions. – f footnote about 600 MHz operation in Table 24. CPU – I/O structure definitions in Table 18: Legend/abbreviations used in the pinout table – V changed to V in Table 62: PLL1/2/3 characteristics (wide VCO DDA DD frequency range) and Table 63: PLL1/2/3 characteristics (low VCO frequency range). Added notes concerning power supply connections for various configurations (GPIO, XSPI, FMC, and so on) in Table 19: STM32H7Rxx8 pin and ball descriptions. Changed all occurrences of V to V . DDUSB DD33USB
